title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at KPMG India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at KPMG India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
